summary: The diff implements useServerState hook with BroadcastChannel integration, countdown timer, startup overlay logic, and ChatPage integration with ShutdownOverlay and StartupOverlay for non-owner users. The core logic appears well-implemented, but the diff is truncated for ChatPage.tsx and the actual ShutdownOverlay.tsx and StartupOverlay.tsx component files are not shown as modified or added, making it impossible to verify their implementation details.

missing_requirements.requirement: ShutdownOverlay.tsx must display: (1) a large '🔴 Server Shut Down' title, (2) the shutdownMessage from localStorage if provided, (3) a live countdown timer formatted as mm:ss that decrements every second. All message input interaction must be completely blocked while the overlay is active.
missing_requirements.reason: ShutdownOverlay.tsx is not listed as a modified or added file in the diff. Its implementation cannot be verified. The component is imported in ChatPage.tsx but the actual overlay component file is absent from the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: StartupOverlay.tsx must display '🟢 Server Starting Up...' as a full-screen green overlay for exactly 5 seconds before fading out.
missing_requirements.reason: StartupOverlay.tsx is not listed as a modified or added file in the diff. Its implementation cannot be verified. The component is imported in ChatPage.tsx but the actual overlay component file is absent from the diff.
